q-style mover { width: 40px; height: 40px; background: red; q-style-path-animation { path: "M 50 50 C 400 50, 50 300, 400 300" duration: 1200 easing: "ease-in-out" anchorPoint: "center" rotation: "auto" repeat: "true" } } q-theme motion-theme { .box { mover } } motion-theme { div#path-box.box { text { path } } }
